vectors.name: CASE..OF (Multiple Branching)
vectors.description: Executes one of several statements based on the value of an ordinal selector expression. Turbo Pascal extends standard Pascal by allowing comma-separated lists, ranges (..), and an explicit ELSE fallback clause.

quirks_and_tests.description: Validates the evaluation of exact matches, ranges, and the ELSE fallback.

vectors.name: FOR..DOWNTO (Decrementing Loop)
vectors.syntax: FOR Counter := Start DOWNTO End DO Statement;
vectors.description: Executes a statement a fixed number of times, strictly decrementing an ordinal control variable by 1 on each iteration. If the Start value is less than the End value, the loop body is bypassed entirely.

quirks_and_tests.description: Uses the DOWNTO keyword instead of a dynamic step. Validates decrementing and bypass logic.
setup: FOR J := 5 DOWNTO 1 DO Inc(DownSum, J);
FOR J := 1 DOWNTO 5 DO Inc(DownSkip, J);

vectors.name: FOR..TO (Incrementing Loop)
vectors.syntax: FOR Counter := Start TO End DO Statement;
vectors.description: Executes a statement a fixed number of times, strictly incrementing an ordinal control variable by 1 on each iteration. The Start and End limits are evaluated exactly once before the loop begins.

quirks_and_tests.description: Validates incrementing logic and ensures the loop is skipped if Start > End.
setup: FOR I := 1 TO 5 DO Inc(ForSum, I);
FOR I := 5 TO 1 DO Inc(ForSkip, I);

vectors.name: IF..THEN..ELSE (Conditional Branching)
vectors.syntax: IF Condition THEN Statement1 [ ELSE Statement2 ];
vectors.description: Branches execution based on a boolean condition. Turbo Pascal strictly forbids placing a semicolon immediately before the ELSE keyword.

quirks_and_tests.description: CRITICAL PARSING QUIRK: Turbo Pascal resolves the 'dangling ELSE' ambiguity by strictly binding the ELSE clause to the closest preceding IF statement.

vectors.name: REPEAT..UNTIL (Post-Condition Loop)
vectors.description: Repeats a sequence of statements until a boolean condition evaluates to True. Because the condition is evaluated after the loop body, the statements are guaranteed to execute AT LEAST ONCE.

quirks_and_tests.description: CRITICAL SYNTAX QUIRK: Unlike WHILE or FOR, REPEAT..UNTIL acts as a natural block envelope and does not require BEGIN..END to wrap multiple statements.

vectors.name: WHILE..DO (Pre-Condition Loop)
vectors.description: Repeats a statement as long as a boolean condition evaluates to True. The condition is evaluated before entering the loop body. If it is initially False, the body is completely bypassed.

quirks_and_tests.description: Validates the pre-condition check and loop execution.
